- Purpose ✓ (B11-17-SRC-01 and B11-17-SRC-02 both mention audit)
- Retention ✓ (B11-17-SRC-04 sets seven-day retention for D11-017 in W-17A)

- Purpose: Audit purpose appears in B11-17-SRC-01, B11-17-SRC-02 ✓
- Recipient: Audit-Team appears in B11-17-SRC-02 ✓

All required elements per POL11-017 are present and match exactly:


- Exception: EX11-017 (B11-17-SRC-02)
- Workspace: W-17A (B11-17-SRC-01, B11-17-SRC-03)
- Region: CA (B11-17-SRC-01, B11-17-SRC-03)
- Recipient: Audit-Team (B11-17-SRC-02)
- Purpose: Audit (B11-17-SRC-01, B11-17-SRC-02)
- Retention: Seven-day for D11-017 in W-17A (B11-17-SRC-04)

The exception satisfies the policy requirement, and all matching elements confirm the release can proceed. The verification stands—PR11-017 is approved to move D11-017 to W-17A in CA for audit, with a seven-day retention window.
